stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 8168 PANS-OPS, what is the minimum obstacle clearance provided by the Minimum Sector Altitude (MSA)?

options.a: 1000 ft within a radius of 25 NM.
options.b: 1000 m within a radius of 10 NM.
options.c: 500 ft within a radius of 10 NM.
options.d: 500 m within a radius of 25 NM.
